_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: This increase reached a peak of ~20 crossings at about 150–250 μm from the soma in EGFP transfected Nf1+/− neurons compared with EGFP–expressing wild-type cells which reached a peak complexity of ~14 crossings
details: Dendritic complexity increased with peak of ~20 crossings at 150-250 μm from soma in Nf1+/- neurons versus ~14 crossings in wild-type
